nasb.text: Also the Glory of Israel will not lie or change His mind; for He is not a man that He should change His mind.”

esv.text: And also the Glory of Israel will not lie or have regret, for he is not a man, that he should have regret.”

cnv.text: 以色列的大能者必不說謊，也不後悔。因為他不是世人，他決不後悔。”

ccb.text: 以色列荣耀的上帝不说谎、也不改变心意，因为祂不是多变的世人。”
